frames.caption: {key:I} — first non-blank.
frames.narration: Cursor jumps before `i` (column 4) and *insert mode* begins. {key:I} is the same as {key:^}{key:i}.

frames.caption: {key:A} — end of line.
frames.narration: {key:A} jumps past the last char. Pair with {key:I} for boundary insertions; pair with {key:o}/{key:O} for new lines.
